questions.q: Which of the following processes requires energy input from an external source?
questions.answer: Active transport

questions.q: In a typical animal cell, the mitochondrion has a surface area-to-volume ratio that is greater than that of the cell itself because of the __________.
questions.answer: cristae

questions.q: When lactose is broken down during digestion, the products are __________.
questions.answer: glucose and galactose

questions.q: Which of the following statements accurately describes the relationship between dehydration synthesis and hydrolysis?
options: Both reactions occur simultaneously in cells
Dehydration synthesis builds polymers; hydrolysis breaks them down
Hydrolysis builds carbohydrates; dehydration synthesis breaks them down
Both reactions require ATP hydrolysis for energy
questions.answer: Dehydration synthesis builds polymers; hydrolysis breaks them down

questions.q: In cells, the hydrophobic tails of phospholipids face __________.
options: the aqueous environment outside the cell
the aqueous environment inside the cell
inward, away from the aqueous environment
questions.answer: inward, away from the aqueous environment

questions.q: A ribosome is best described as __________.
options: an organelle bound by a double membrane
questions.answer: a site for protein synthesis

questions.q: Hydrogen bonds are important in all of the following EXCEPT __________.
options: the bonding between glucose units in starch
questions.answer: the bonding between glucose units in starch

questions.q: Which of the following is true about the function of enzymes?
options: They increase the activation energy of reactions
They change the direction of chemical reactions
They are used up in the reactions they catalyze
They lower the activation energy of reactions
questions.answer: They lower the activation energy of reactions
